creator: darrendavid@gmail.com
text:
linux-crashplan currently has a dependency on linux_base-f10, the latter reports the following message upon install:

"This port is deprecated; you may wish to reconsider installing it:
Fedora 10 is unsupported and vulnerable.
It is scheduled to be removed on or after 2016-12-31."

It seems this dependency will cause linux-crashplan to stop working after the first of this year.
